name: playkit-js-qna

coreResponsibility.summary: A Kaltura Player plugin that provides live Q&A (Questions & Answers) functionality for live streaming sessions, enabling viewers to submit questions, receive answers, view announcements, and interact with 'Answer on Air' (AoA) features during live broadcasts.

featureOwnership: Live Q&A question submission and display
Q&A thread management (master questions and replies)
Toast notifications for new replies, announcements, and AoA events
KitchenSink side panel UI for Q&A interface
Message delivery status tracking (pending, sending, failed, created)

stateManagement: Menu icon indication state for unread notifications
dataObjects: QnaMessage - Question, Answer, Announcement, AnswerOnAir types
CuePoint - Kaltura annotation and code cue points
MetadataInfo - Message type, state, parentId from XML metadata
messageTypes: AnswerOnAir - Questions being answered live on air

repositories.name: playkit-js-kaltura-cuepoints
repositories.purpose: Provides cue point registration and timed metadata events (PUBLIC_QNA, USER_QNA, CODE_QNA types)

repositories.name: playkit-js-ui-managers
repositories.purpose: Provides SidePanelsManager, UpperBarManager, ToastManager, and BannerManager services

repositories.name: kaltura-player-js
repositories.purpose: Core player providing BasePlugin, event system, provider layer, and UI framework

repositories.name: playkit-js-common
repositories.purpose: Shared utilities, A11yWrapper, EventsManager, ToastManager, and BannerManager components

services: Kaltura Backend - cuepoint_cuepoint service for adding/updating Q&A cue points
Kaltura Backend - metadata_metadata service for adding Q&A metadata
Kaltura Backend - metadata_metadataprofile service for fetching Kaltura-QnA profile

consumers: Kaltura Player embedded in web applications
Virtual Events platforms using Kaltura Player

externalAPIs.name: Kaltura Cue Point API
externalAPIs.purpose: Create and update Q&A annotation cue points

externalAPIs.name: Kaltura Metadata API
externalAPIs.purpose: Add metadata XML to cue points containing Q&A type and state

sourceOfTruth.purpose: Main plugin class with initialization, event handling, and UI management
QnaMessage creation and XML metadata parsing
Central message state management with add, update, delete operations
User Q&A message handling, submission, and server communication
Answer on Air notification handling and banner display
Multi-request builder for Kaltura API calls

configurationOptions: bannerDuration - Duration for AoA banner display
expandMode - Side panel mode (alongside, over, hidden)
expandOnFirstPlay - Auto-expand plugin on first play

errorPatterns: QnA Plugin doesn't support non-live media
Q&A notifications are not available during VOD
kalturaCuepoints, sidePanelsManager or upperBarManager haven't registered
Type is missing at metadata xml
There are no metadata objects xml at KalturaMetadataListResponse
DOMParser is not exits at window
Can't make reply requests without thread
